calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Jun-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Continued To Apr-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that he was provided with information regarding Mr. Corn's finances but nothing regarding his physical or medical condition, that Mr. Corn does require some assistance, that he has not received responses from the Heirs in Germany, that the expenses on the condominium are 100% and that they never got around to doing a reformation of the Trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
